title: Euchiton sphaericus
taxonomy: Euchiton sphaericus is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its flower structure and leaf morphology. Euchiton sphaericus is also classified within the genus Euchiton, a group of shrubby plants native to Australia and New Zealand. The species is further classified as a member of the order Asterales, a large group of flowering plants that include daisies and sunflowers. Within this classification, Euchiton sphaericus is recognized as a unique species due to its distinct characteristics and distribution.
